Miss Marple investigates the history of the property and discovers it was connected with a baffling disappearance years before - which has never been solved. With Dawn French, Russ Abbot, Geraldine Chaplin, Phil Davis and Sarah Parish

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason and Dawson try to trace Rosie's whereabouts in Australia, and Mick becomes a suspect when they uncover evidence of domestic violence in his relationship with her. Meanwhile in Brisbane, Carol visits a monastery to find out more about her long-lost brother, but her search leads to a trap when she receives a call from someone claiming to have information. Starring Joe McFadden, Clare Wille and Lisa Kay

programme.desc: Biff is shocked when he hears about Kathy's accident. Terry flirts with Tricia in the Woolpack. Steve suggests to Kim that they avoid the pressure and make a run for it

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is annoyed when Kim decides to stay in the village. He goes to dig up the money but is interrupted by Chris. Zak and Butch plan to burgle the garden centre

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud fears she is going to lose Maureen to Fred when they get married. Steve plans to move away from Weatherfield. Jim tells Fiona there is a chance he is the father of her baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is sickened at the thought of carrying Jim's baby. Kevin talks Natalie out of reporting Sally to the police. Percy is puzzled to find things missing in Emily's house

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A barman from rural inn the Maid in Splendour is shot dead as he walks near a ruined cottage in woodlands - and Barnaby's investigation reveals a clash between charming landlord Michael Bannerman, the unofficial squire of Midsomer Worthy, and his abrasive son Stephen, who now runs the pub. John Nettles and John Hopkins star, with guest appearances by William Gaunt, Alan Cox, Dave Hill and Frances Tomelty

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A prostitute's client confesses to the murder of another working girl before vanishing into the night, leaving Wycliffe with the tricky task of tracking him down before he kills again. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the mysterious death of businessman John Shearwood, found floating in the water under the Gateshead Millennium Bridge when he was supposed to be on a golfing trip to Ireland. The man's wife Stella and brother Luke are baffled to discover he was working as an informant for HM Revenue and Customs. Chief Revenue investigator Owen Preece (guest star Robert Glenister) reveals John's business manager Mark Donovan has been running an alcohol scam through their haulage firm and the deceased had agreed to offer information in exchange for immunity from prosecution. Was his cover blown? Owen doesn't think so, and Mark has an alibi - unlike John's wife. Brenda Blethyn stars, with David Leon as her trusty sidekick Joe

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in Hastings when a black GI is suspected of murdering a local woman. The victim, an ex-lover of the suspect and the mother of his baby, was staying at a guest house where Samantha is assistant manager, and had been disowned by her family because of her mixed-race child. As Foyle investigates, he is not convinced the soldier could be capable of such a crime, and soon comes up against the might of the US Army as he tries to crack the case. Starring Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks, Obi Abili and Charlotte Riley

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The apparent accidental death of a drug addict takes a surprising turn when the results of the post-mortem examination are revealed, and Jack finds himself confronting his own chequered past. Ewen Bremner guest-stars, with David Jason

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: After resigning from his job as a traffic warden, henpecked George wonders how he can break the news to wife Mildred without incurring her wrath. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers babysit for their neighbours, but George misses his usual routine - so he nips out to a darts match with the infant in tow. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: On Todd's instructions, Will forces his way into Paul and Billy's flat. Asha spells it out to Corey that he's dumped, and Aadi runs some business ideas past an impressed Dev. Overhearing Leanne on the phone, Simon realises they're behind with the electricity payments

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A murder gives rise to rumours of a communist conspiracy. Poirot becomes the centre of attention at the Chelsea Flower Show as he views a rose named in his honour, while Hastings receives a packet of seeds that give him hay fever. Whodunit, guest starring Anne Stallybrass (Heartbeat), with David Suchet

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A book dealer is found drowned, having seemingly committed suicide in despair at having sunk all his cash in a local inventor's revolutionary new transport system - but the discovery of a second body makes it clear that there is a murderer at large. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Kate Buffery and Richard Todd

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Sergeant Troy is promoted to Inspector, but before he can consider his future he has to help Barnaby investigate the collapse of a tunnel which has exposed a collection of ancient skeletons - and more recent remains among the bones suggest links to a nearby double shooting. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Cherie Lunghi and David Bradley

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A local woman is found murdered following a row with her husband at a residents' association Spanish-themed evening. The finger of suspicion soon points to an odd-job man with a violent history, and the chairman of the association reveals he heard a squeaking noise after the victim left - but the witness promptly winds up dead himself. Crime drama, starring John Nettles

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A depressive gambler is found dead, the apparent victim of suicide. Dr Jane Moore, who once treated the man, is adamant he wouldn't have taken his own life - a theory backed up by the post-mortem. Thrilled to be working with Jane again, Barnaby investigates the case - and it isn't long before another of the doctor's patients is killed. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Isla Blair, Jan Ravens and Daniel Casey

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is called in when David Kenworthy, the son of a prominent local family, is found murdered on the beach at Whitley Bay. A witness spotted arcade owner Larry Crowe arguing with David on the night of the killing, and a search of the suspect's property uncovers a bloodied baseball bat. However, Larry has a cast-iron alibi and it's clear he wasn't the only person the victim met that night. A second death then leaves Vera facing mounting pressure to crack the case, and struggling to answer the question of why David was drawn to the seafront on the evening of his father's retirement. Brenda Blethyn stars in the murder mystery, with David Leon as her trusty sidekick Joe

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A magistrate acquaintance of Wycliffe is found hanged and all the evidence points to suicide, but the Cornish copper remains unconvinced and pursues an unorthodox investigation, eventually forcing the forensic pathologist to reconsider his verdict. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd and Pam Ferris

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid informs Jean he has been given a temporary promotion at work, but she soon begins to doubt what he says. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong looks back on the coronation for the 65th anniversary, and introduces some of the best quality colour footage of the event that survives to this day. programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at television sporting firsts, including footage of a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan who would go on to take snooker by storm

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A distinguished Army colonel is found dead in mysterious circumstances and the finger of suspicion points to his widow. Holmes has to solve a murder involving a locked room with no key, a domestic quarrel and odd animal-like tracks outside the window. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad is called in to catch a gunman who has stolen cash from a lock-up. Hard-hitting detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team look ahead to today's racing, including the Dublin Racing Festival at Leopardstown

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from April 1975, including Tottenham Hotspur v Chelsea, Everton v Sheffield United and Norwich City v Nottingham Forest

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. Ali, Neil and Tom find it difficult to tempt the carp as this lake has been fished regularly by other anglers, and these old fish have seen everything over the years

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and presents coverage of 10 races from four courses, including the 1.50 Contenders Hurdle and 2.20 Grade One Scilly Isles Novices' Chase at Sandown Park, the 2.05 Edinburgh National from Musselburgh, the 2.35 Towton Novices' Chase from Wetherby, and two races from Dublin Racing Festival at Leopardstown. With analysis from Luke Harvey, Alice Plunkett and Mick Fitzgerald, reports by Natalie Green, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: The Sting (1973)
programme.desc: Two conmen decide to swindle a mobster out of a fortune in revenge for the murder of a mutual friend. Enlisting the help of a host of crooks, they quickly conjure up a brilliant scheme to make him pay for his crime. Oscar-winning Depression-era comedy drama, starring Robert Redford, Paul Newman, Robert Shaw, Charles Durning and Eileen Brennan

programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Nevada Smith (1966)
programme.desc: The son of a Native American mother and a white father dedicates his life to gaining revenge on the three outlaws who murdered them. Western adventure, starring Steve McQueen, Karl Malden, Brian Keith, Arthur Kennedy and Suzanne Pleshette

programme.title: Six Nations Highlights
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents action from the opening weekend of the championship. Wales played host to Ireland at the Principality Stadium and Wayne Pivac's side will have wanted to break their run of four successive defeats in the Six Nations after a campaign to forget in 2020. Plus. the key moments from the Calcutta Cup, as England welcomed Scotland to Twickenham, and France's trip to Rome, as last year's runners-up took on Italy at the Stadio Olimpico

programme.title: RoboCop (1987)
programme.desc: A police officer in a future Detroit ravaged by crime is seemingly killed in the line of duty, but is rebuilt as a law-enforcing cyborg by the corporation that has taken over running the force. He begins to remember his human life and seeks to bring his killers to justice - a mission that leads him to turn on his corrupt corporate masters. Sci-fi thriller, starring Peter Weller, Nancy Allen, Ronny Cox and Miguel Ferrer

programme.title: RoboCop 2 (1990)
programme.desc: The cybernetic law enforcer returns to battle a deranged drug lord. Meanwhile, he is unaware the corporation that created him has scheduled his replacement by a more powerful version. To complete the new cyborg, they need a human brain, and a renegade scientist secretly implants the injured drug lord's brain into the robot, transforming it into an uncontrollable killing machine. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Peter Weller, Nancy Allen, Tom Noonan and Belinda Bauer

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers
programme.desc: The Yangtze - the longest river in Asia and the third-longest in the world - was once home to rare aquatic mammals and prodigious quantities of fish. Curious to know what still lurks in its murky currents, Jeremy explores Shanghai, the huge Three Gorges Dam and the wild uplands of Yunnan. The people he meets make him question his own preconceptions as a biologist and naturalist

programme.desc: The Contessa gives Harry a shotgun for his birthday, which he is soon given cause to use when he becomes the target of a manhunt while investigating political blackmail

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The duo try to track down an American colonel tormented by memories his harrowing experiences while in command of an air base in Vietnam. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey comes up against a man who is his equal in all respects. The only difference is that he's on the wrong side of the law. Obsessed with capturing him, Dempsey tests Makepeace's patience to the limit. Will Dempsey succeed against impossible odds?

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The university branch of a bank is robbed, and though Regan and the Flying Squad catch most of the gang a known killer and his sidekick remain inside holding the manager and two women hostage. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel investigate reports of a traitor in the ranks, and end up facing the heart-breaking prospect of bidding each other farewell. Patrick Macnee stars, with Diana Rigg making her final appearance as Emma and Linda Thorson taking over as Steed's latest partner Tara King

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur spies a business opportunity as he and Ray prepare to pay their respects to the late Charlie Johnson, but the deceased's widow has other ideas. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole discovers the joys of Portugal's roads on a visit to the Algarve and joins Sam Lovegrove on the epic Pioneer Run, racing from London to Brighton on pre-1915 bikes

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Part one. Dempsey goes undercover as a small-time crook to snare an underhanded police commissioner

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Tara and Steed try and put all the pieces together when people start turning up dead in unique locations with a jigsaw puzzle piece placed on their persons. Peter Jeffrey guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gives up smoking and drinking on doctor's orders, and soon appears to lose his grip on reality, demanding the police protect him from an apparently non-existent angry customer. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole rides through Andalucia and meets up with Zef Eisenberg back in the UK

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of family and friends from Middlesbrough answers questions from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The concrete boat job has turned into a nightmare. The houseboat has collapsed in on itself and there's mess and concrete debris everywhere. While Luke, Jayde and Ellie navigate the extreme humidity, mud and mangroves, Dan and Jordan are off to evaluate their next job. The Belle Canto is smashed upon the rocks. It's a total write-off and they wont be able to use Christopher to winch it out. To make matters worse, Jordan has lost control of the team's dingy.

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw

Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles

programme.desc: Compilation episode taking a look behind the scenes of the Symphony of the Seas, the most creative-thinking and mammoth ship ever built. It features some of the 2,200 crew members that work around the clock to keep 6,680 holidaymakers happy. The ship boasts 20 pools and jacuzzis, two surf simulators, a rock climbing wall, an ice rink, a basketball court and a mini-golf course

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Music Week in the pottery, as the remaining potters sculpt a life-like bust of a music legend, kick starting with a surprise special message from an iconic artist. The potters then face a fiddly second challenge to make a mini musical instrument, before judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: After Peter's brush with death, Catherine doubts her abilities to lead a coup and puts the plan on hold. But Peter has a new lease on life and is becoming open to Catherine's progressive ideas. Comedy drama, starring Elle Fanning and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch, joining Britain's favourite opinionated viewers as part of this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Also taking part are Line of Duty's Adrian Dunbar, Vicky McClure and Martin Compston, KSI and Craig David, David Mitchell and Victoria Coren Mitchell, and Roger Daltrey and John Bishop. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchester mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: Five citizens of a small town decide to join forces to rid the town of Mike, a local who is ruining everyone's lives. But they soon realise that once you start playing God, it's easy to end up as the Devil. Crime drama, starring Claus Riis Ostergaard. In Danish with English subtitles

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
programme.desc: An ordinary man seeks solace from his mundane life by drifting into daydreams where he is a heroic figure. When he and a friend are faced with unemployment, he is propelled into a globetrotting adventure in real life. Comedy drama based on James Thurber's short story, directed by and starring Ben Stiller. With Kristen Wiig, Adam Scott and Shirley MacLaine

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Luton, Bedfordshire, battle it out in the culinary contest, beginning with Bridget and her husband Peter, whose menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites leaves their rivals distinctly unimpressed. Next to host are Shawn and Kendra, who prepare dishes based on their travels, before serving up a dessert that reflects their Canadian heritage. Finally, footballer Richard and his fiancee Marina decide to cook an Italian-inspired meal - but Richard proves to be more of a hindrance than a help in the kitchen. With the trio of parties complete, the couples reconvene to decide which pair hosted the best event

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: India v England. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the four-match series, which takes place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. England's all-time leading Test run-scorer and former captain Alastair Cook joins presenter Rishi Persad in the studio

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: India v England. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the four-match series, which takes place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. England's all-time leading Test run-scorer and former captain Alastair Cook joins presenter Rishi Persad in the studio

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders' advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the small fishing village of Polperro in southern Cornwall, harbourmaster Olly Puckey prepares for the arrival of a new storm gate, designed to protect residents, houses and fishing boats from the winter sea surges. In Devon, dairy farmer Jon Perkin hopes visitors at Widdecombe Fair are willing to try his alternative ice-cream and yoghurt, while stonemason Alex Piper and glazier Arthur Bradley must draw on all their skills and experience to save the crumbling vestry window of a church in the Cornish village of Warbstow

programme.title: Undercover Police: Hunting Paedophiles
programme.desc: Documentary following officers as they assume new identities online and are given the task of engaging with people who have demonstrated a sexual interest in children. In the first edition, an undercover officer pretends to be a 47-year-old paedophile, claiming he enjoys sexually abusing his 10-year-old daughter and is looking for other men who would like to join him

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Cameras follow Thames Valley Police's investigation into the murder of 64-year-old Hang Yin Leung, who died after being violently assaulted during a burglary at her Milton Keynes home in January 2017. Filmed over 12 months, the programme interweaves the police's enquiries with an intimate portrait of a British-Chinese family coming to terms with the impact of murder, with the story of migrants from Hong Kong who came to the UK in search of a better life for their son unfolding alongside the hunt for the killers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick tries to save a tortoiseshell cat's leg by cutting out a tumour that has developed and replacing its knee with a unique bionic implant. programme.desc: An exploration of the history of Kensington Palace, which is currently the official London residence of the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge, the Duke and Duchess of Gloucester, the Duke and Duchess of Kent, and Prince and Princess Michael of Kent. Kate Williams also tells the tale of Elizabeth I's make-up, which was so poisonous that it would be illegal today, with her foundation made of lead and vinegar, her rouge from lead carbonate, and her lipstick from ground alabaster, with side-effects including digestive problems and respiratory issues

programme.title: When Fergie Met the Monarchy
programme.desc: If anyone should have been prepared for royal life, it was the Fergusons, with Prince Andrew and Sarah childhood playmates at Windsor Castle, and both families firm friends. This documentary examines the experiences of royal life for Sarah Ferguson and her family after she married Prince Andrew, and the impact on both sides after the marriage ended in scandal and divorce

programme.desc: A Lilliputian lope round the Inner Hebrides puts Jane in touch with her Scottish roots, as alongside just six other passengers the singer embarks on what is easily her smallest ever cruise. Jane enjoys unseasonably cloudless skies and sparkling seas as the route takes in the puffin-packed Treshnish Islands and Fingal's Cave on Staffa, the mythic rock formation that famously inspired Mendelssohn's Hebrides Overture. programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For years, London's East End was denied a new bridge because of the need to guarantee passage of ships up and down the Thames. For years, the greatest engineers of the age hunted for a design that would keep both road and water traffic moving. As Rob Bell explains, the solution came from architect Horace Jones, whose revolutionary design, with its thousand-tonne opening sections, was powered by nothing more than water. Rob also explains the bridge was lucky to survive the Second World War, having been a target for German V-1 flying bombs

programme.title: City Life to Country Life
programme.desc: A look at four intrepid families who have rejected the city and embraced a rural lifestyle in some of the most stunning parts of the UK. The series begins with Ian, who left his career as a builder, and former teacher Sarah, who decided to start a goat farm from scratch at the foot of the Mendip Hills. Their new life allows them to spend more time together with their two sons, as well as indulge in their creative passions. Stephen Mangan narrates

programme.title: City Life to Country Life
programme.desc: A profile of the McWhinneys, whose Scottish island has been their ancestral home since the 15th century. The lively family of five are the only occupants of Dry Isle - a tidal island, connected to the land by a floating footbridge. Their ancestors owned and worked from this island for centuries. To keep up with the demands of modern life, dad Ian and mum Jess have had to diversify and make the most of the landscape around them

programme.title: City Life to Country Life
programme.desc: Graham and Ruth are living a dream life with their three children on the beautiful island of Bryher in the Scilly Isles - 50 km off Cornwall. With turquoise waters at their doorstep and some of the most picturesque scenery around, cameras follow the family as they run a 40-acre farm, providing the island with much of its produce. Stephen Mangan narrates

programme.title: City Life to Country Life
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Fran and Kevin Blockley, who live on Old Chapel farm in Wales, alongside their children and a collection of volunteers who come to live and work there throughout the year. They endeavour to live close to the land - growing their food, tending livestock, practising ancient crafts, living together and celebrating the seasons in their passing

programme.title: Greatest Hits of the
programme.desc: The stories behind six songs more from the decade, examining Bony M's Rivers of Babylon, 10cc's I'm Not in Love, Donna Summer's I Feel Love, Gerry Rafferty's Baker Street, You're the One That I Want from the musical Grease and Gloria Gaynor's disco smash I Will Survive. Contributors include Liz Mitchell, Kevin Godley, Pete Bellotte, Rab Noakes, Hugh Burns, Stuart Maconie and Bill Oakes

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Business partners Sunhil and Nilesh, whose luxury trips to Dubai cost thousands, swap holidays with down-on-their luck, unemployed friends Suzanne and Urshella. Sunil and Nilesh are sent on an out-of-season camping trip in the Wiltshire countryside, while Suzanne and Urshella are off on a no-expense-spared week in the sun- drenched vineyards of Viseu in northern Portugal

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: When holidays go right they offer much-needed rest and relaxation in the lap of luxury. However, those same vacations can just as easily end in disaster. Examples include chartered accountant Bill and his wife Tanya, who spent £11,000 on a once-in-a-lifetime cruise to the Bahamas, only to end up trapped in the eye of a cyclone. Iain and Judie's luxury dream trip to Vegas turned into deadly nightmare when they were caught up in the now infamous shootings in October 2017 in which 58 people were killed. Contributors include Danni Menzies, Scarlette Douglas and Simon Calder. Narrated by Glynis Barber

programme.desc: People whose body art was intended to be a tribute to a family member, but did not turn out as planned, including a mother of five with a flower design dedicated to her father, a teenager whose amateur tattooist friend spelled her niece's name wrong on her hand, and a man whose tribute to his grandmother was not well received. Plus, a cancer survivor whose tattoos tell the story of her recovery

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis meets a homeowner who feels trapped in her property, and has seen various attempts to sell it fall through. She receives advice from a feng shui expert, who claims she is too fixated on the past, a 'home healer', who diagnoses low energy levels in the property, and a mystic who announces that the tree outside her bedroom window has to go

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice offers advice to a woman hoping to sell her desirable property in Sutton-in-Ashfield, Nottinghamshire. Presented by Alistair Appleton

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly takes frogspawn home to look after, but is shocked the following morning to discover it has turned into tadpoles

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit get stranded on an island after a fishing trip goes wrong, so Daddy Dog sets out to rescue them

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Inspired by Granny Pig's perfume, the piglet experiments with the flowers in her garden to make her own scent

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Dada Make tries out his new painting robot while Mya is over at Ruby's house

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You
programme.desc: Magenta needs new glasses, and Josh and Blue try to guess what she wants to do once she gets them

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Gordon and Rebecca do the same work, but differently. When Rebecca tries to be more like Gordon, it does not go well

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Celebrations to mark the Wholefish Cafe's millionth customer do not go to plan

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie
programme.desc: The duo teams up with Daddy, Whizzy and Boo to put on a musical to show their friends what they have learned about the different seasons

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig worries that everyone has forgotten Father's Day, so Peppa and George make sure he has the best day ever - including a very special cake

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig gets a new synthesiser, so the family collect sounds for it from around the house while he is out at work

programme.title: Milkshake! Bop Box Boogie
programme.desc: Specially composed and choreographed songs, with the presenters teaching the audience the moves and then encouraging them to dance along with them

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The little bear accidentally releases the school pet that Judy is looking after

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Helen allows Toot to take over as emergency dispatcher for the day

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Pirata responds to a call for help which turns out to have come from Murana. Honour obliges that she come to her rival's rescue anyway - even if it costs her a precious treasure

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: The inquisitive puppet visits the Met Office to find out where rain comes from, while the Milkshakers! show him how to make a rain collector

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: During a picnic in her garden, cousin Chloe shows Peppa and George fun things to do with wild flowers

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Big Boo loves freshly baked croissants - and tries to get his hands on one while the others are playing boules

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Vic experience one of the most violent cases they have ever faced when they are confronted by an angry older gentleman. Later, the pair chase £3,000 owed for an unwanted car engine, but the debtor is convinced that he knows the law and the agents' jobs better than they do. Meanwhile, Steve and Ben face a dilemma in north London, where a tenant is being evicted for rent arrears, and in south London, Paul and Steve have no option but to force a dramatic entry into a property

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An east London landlord who trusted his property to a letting agency discovers the house is being advertised on a Romanian website - and strangers have moved in. A South Yorkshire single mum is owed £10,000 in back rent when her tenant disappears, and has to prove he has abandoned the property to get it back. Plus, west London housing officers investigate a tip-off about people living in dangerous conditions behind a row of shops

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean's attempts to get back with Ziggy are getting on everyone's nerves. John practises his lines with Nikau and Bella, unsure how to go about his first online date

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila and Des stage a fake date to uncover Clive's real feelings, but their plan backfires. Hendrix steals a gun out of fear, and ends up hiding it in the Kennedy pizza oven

programme.title: Murders at the Lake (2019)
programme.desc: While on vacation, a family become the unsuspecting target of a grieving women embroiled in the mystery surrounding a tragic death after a group of teens make a pact to keep what happened secret. Thriller, starring Nicky Whelan and Anna Hutchison

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. He meets Allana, whose two Labradors Teddy and Fudge pull her along at break-neck speed when out walking. He then visits Peggy, a cross-breed with a penchant for escaping, no matter how much her owners try to keep her penned in. Finally, Graeme heads to Blackpool, where Stanley the terrier has been struggling ever since his best friend Sweep died

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila and Des stage a fake date to uncover Clive's real feelings, but their plan backfires. Hendrix steals a gun out of fear, and ends up hiding it in the Kennedy pizza oven

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean's attempts to get back with Ziggy are getting on everyone's nerves. John practises his lines with Nikau and Bella, unsure how to go about his first online date

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Gallagher Premiership Rugby Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the eighth round of fixtures, featuring Bristol Bears v Sale Sharks at Ashton Gate, Bath v Harlequins at Recreation Ground, Leicester Tigers v Worcester Warriors at Welford Road, London Irish v Gloucester at Community Stadium, Wasps v Northampton Saints at Ricoh Arena and Newcastle Falcons v Exeter Chiefs at Kingston Park

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A patient brought into Hull Royal Infirmary by police claims to have swallowed drugs, but he refuses to co-operate with staff, putting them under further pressure. In resus, a patient's life hangs in the balance as the team assess the extent of a serious brain bleed, which could be life-altering, while a 17-year-old arrives after injuring his ankle at a skate park

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: A two-year-old is rushed to hospital, struggling to breathe, and consultant and part-time stand-up comic Dr Rob Jones is forced to put his comedy skills to good use keeping the distressed child relaxed. Other patients include a miner who has suffered a suspected heart attack and a 98-year-old in need of a CT scan

programme.title: Celebs on the Farm
programme.desc: The celebs arrive on the farm in style before adopting calves, mucking out a calf creche and discovering a caravan park from hell. Farmer Chris gets very angry

programme.title: Critical Surgery: Changing Lives
programme.desc: Every year 20 volunteer medics travel to Ethiopia with the Facing Africa charity, to perform reconstructive facial surgery on patients with little or no health care facilities. The first of two documentaries about their work focuses on 22-year-old Zinash, who has a tumour that has been growing for more than six years. It has now taken over her lower jaw and will kill her if not treated. The Facing Africa medics are her only hope - but this is the first time they have undertaken such a complex operation. Can they save Zinash?

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets people who have started self-sufficient new lives in the country. The first episode features the Cook family from Exeter, who plan to move to the other end of the country and make a fresh start in the Shetland Islands. They plan to fund their new lifestyle through AirBnB and an isolated space for authors, but their move is complicated by a serious illness in the family

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Mosque
programme.desc: Meera Syal narrates a documentary going behind the scenes at the Baitul Futuh mosque in Morden, south London, home to Britain's 30,000-strong Ahmadi Muslim community. The film reveals the defining moments of life at the mosque, from finding love to committing to faith as well as looking at international celebrations and a tragedy that devastates the entire community

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and the team try to find out whether paranormal forces are at work in a south London house that appears to be making the family who live there experience mood swings, anxiety and relationship breakdowns

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice visits the market town of Frome, Somerset, to find out why no one can secure a sale for a grade II-listed home

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Cocoon (1985)
programme.desc: The elderly residents of a retirement home treat themselves to an occasional dip in the pool at an abandoned house. It turns out that friendly aliens in human form are using the place to restore dormant members of their species - and energy from their cocoons is giving the old-timers a new lease of life. Ron Howard's sci-fi drama, with Wilford Brimley, Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Don Ameche and Steve Guttenberg

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1963)
programme.desc: The world's most inept police detective, Inspector Clouseau, heads off to Switzerland in search of a suave jewel thief who has purloined a priceless diamond from a princess - but the bumbling officer's every ruse to foil the crime ends in chaos, not least when he is framed for the robbery himself. Blake Edwards' comedy, starring Peter Sellers, David Niven, Capucine, Robert Wagner and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: A manned mission to Mars is abruptly abandoned, with one crew member left for dead. However, the astronaut has survived and faces a series of challenges - to contact Earth and arrange his rescue and to survive for the years it will take for a spacecraft to reach him on resources intended to last the crew a month. Ridley Scott's sci-fi drama based on the novel by Andy Weir, starring Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch (1982)
programme.desc: A doctor is suspicious when a patient is murdered by an assailant who subsequently kills himself. He and the victim's daughter investigate, leading them to the eccentric owner of a company manufacturing Halloween masks, who has tapped into dark magical forces and has sinister plans for the youngsters buying his wares. Horror, starring Tom Atkins and Stacey Nelkin

programme.title: Videoman (2018)
programme.desc: Ennio Midena used to own Sweden's greatest VHS store, but now he's a washed up alcoholic. When he is offered 10,000 euros for a rare videotape, it seems like his luck is about to change. However, when he discovers the tape has been stolen, Midena will stop at nothing to get it back. Comedy thriller, starring Stefan Sauk and Lena Nilsson. In Swedish and English

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie (1998)
programme.desc: Tommy tries to return his new brother to the baby shop, helped by Angelica, Chuckie, Phil and Lil - but the friends become lost in dense woodlands en route, turning their expedition into a scary and exciting journey of discovery. Animated comedy based on the TV series, with the voices of Elizabeth Daily, Christine Cavanaugh, Kath Soucie, Whoopi Goldberg and Busta Rhymes

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: City Slickers (1991)
programme.desc: Three middle-aged men take a break from the rat race and their mid-life crises to join a two-week cattle drive from New Mexico to Colorado. Together with a bunch of fellow urbanites, they find the going much tougher than expected, and it is down to a real-life cowboy to whip them into shape. Comedy adventure, starring Billy Crystal, Daniel Stern, Bruno Kirby and Jack Palance, who won an Oscar for his performance as grizzled trail boss Curly

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Red (2010)
programme.desc: A retired CIA agent survives an assassination attempt and realises something in his past has made him a target. He sets out to reunite the members of his old hit squad to find out who is trying to kill them and why, but in the process, uncovers dangerous secrets. Action thriller, with Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich and Helen Mirren

programme.title: The Gift (2015)
programme.desc: A man has a chance encounter with an old schoolfriend whom he does not remember. A series of troubling further meetings and mysterious presents bring dark secrets to light and leave his wife concerned about how little she knows about his past. Thriller, starring Rebecca Hall, Jason Bateman and Joel Edgerton, who also directed

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: A fugitive fleeing from a police manhunt is desperate to see his newborn son. Needing a hiding place, he takes a recovering meth addict hostage in her own home. The pair make an unlikely connection as they bond over finding ways to cope with the challenges in their lives. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Mara and David Oyelowo

programme.title: Words of Caramel
programme.desc: In a refugee camp in the Sahara desert lives a Deaf boy who wants to learn to write, to express the words of his camel friend

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla

programme.title: The Far Country (1954)
programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

programme.title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971)
programme.desc: A Navy intelligence agent heads to Scotland, where he poses as a marine biologist to investigate the theft of millions of pounds in gold bullion from ships off the British coast. However, the locals counter his enquiries with hostility, especially when he sets his sights on a Greek tycoon, whom he suspects may be operating as a modern-day pirate. Thriller, with Anthony Hopkins, Robert Morley and Jack Hawkins. Based on a novel by Alistair MacLean

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017)
programme.desc: Grieving mother Mildred Hayes has suffered an unimaginable personal loss, and hatches an idea that drags the residents of Ebbing, Missouri into a maelstrom of revenge. She pressures Sheriff Bill Willoughby and his forces into continuing the investigation into her daughter's murder. It becomes an obsession that has dramatic repercussions for all of the locals. Martin McDonagh's Bafta and Oscar-winning crime drama, starring Frances McDormand, Sam Rockwell and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: A man fakes his own death and frames his wife for murder, but after six years in prison she is released. Since the woman has already served her time, she has nothing to lose by really killing him - but her mission of vengeance is complicated by a zealous parole officer determined to stop her. Thriller, starring Ashley Judd, Tommy Lee Jones, Bruce Greenwood and Annabeth Gish

programme.title: White God (2014)
programme.desc: Teenager Lili is devastated when her father chooses to abandon her beloved dog Hagen on the streets, rather than pay a new tax on non-pedigree canines. She sets out to find her pet, while Hagen embarks on an adventure of his own that sees him joining forces with a pack of fellow crossbreeds. Drama, starring Zsofia Psotta and Sandor Zsoter. In Hungarian and English

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring ducks going up an escalator, animal impressions, narrow escapes on a snowboard and an energy drink house prank

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A professional wrestler swaps lives with a devoted wife and mum whose disconnected husband prefers video games over family time

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As the two newest couples settle in, the original couples are still reeling from an eventful dinner party the night before. John is forced to step in during the commitment ceremony

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: It's been over a month since the couples first met as complete strangers at the altar. Now they must move into the next challenging part of the experiment - the husbands' homestays

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny discovers she has a dedicated group of fans from her Serial Ape-ist days when she accompanies Leonard to a comic-con. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch at Penny's flat, and stress over the baby's arrival prompts Howard to make an impulsive purchase

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Kelly Osbourne and her friend Sammy Barratt-Singh, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Nicole Appleton and Mel Blatt, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, Little Mix, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rachel Riley and Pasha Kovalev, Jamie and Rebekah Vardy, and Jessie J and Jamal Edwards become TV critics. Shows under their scrutiny include Countdown, Love Island, Antiques Roadshow, Naked Attraction, It, My Gay Dog And Other Animals, and Killing Eve. From June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes from early 2020, including EastEnders, This Morning, Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, The Sex Clinic, Hunted, the news featuring movie director Harvey Weinstein and Netflix hit The Stranger

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes from November 2017, including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, the Weakest Link Celebrity Special for Children in Need, Mary Berry's Country House Secrets, The Secret Life of the Zoo, Blue Planet II, The Theory of Everything and the News

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons meet up with possible partners at a restaurant, hoping to find love. Each person has chosen their date based solely on an internet photograph, and at the end of the meal, they decide whether they want to take things further. Best friends Ben and Ross from Bournemouth, Dorset, arrive together for their dates with Lucy and Regan, while Paul worries about his stutter as he greets Kathryn

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Young and well-spoken Ed meets the equally inexperienced Purdey, who tries to hide her 'crazy' personality, while 23-year-old Essex boy Mark, who claims to have racked up 64 sexual partners despite still living with his parents, has the task of wooing Clare, who won't sleep with anyone until they have been together for four months. Plus, Paul returns to the restaurant after his stammer got the better of him during his first date to try his luck with a new potential partner

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Kelly Osbourne and her friend Sammy Barratt-Singh, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Nicole Appleton and Mel Blatt, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, Little Mix, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rachel Riley and Pasha Kovalev, Jamie and Rebekah Vardy, and Jessie J and Jamal Edwards become TV critics. Shows under their scrutiny include Countdown, Love Island, Antiques Roadshow, Naked Attraction, It, My Gay Dog And Other Animals, and Killing Eve. From June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes from early 2020, including EastEnders, This Morning, Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, The Sex Clinic, Hunted, the news featuring movie director Harvey Weinstein and Netflix hit The Stranger

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rugby-loving groom-to-be Wes plans a wedding in front of 26,000 people at a Premiership match, but his fiancee Charlotte is dreaming of a much more intimate day

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Sienna races against time to save her relationship after Summer's meddling. Elsewhere, Sid is forced to get his hands dirty, and Seth prepares to leave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Sunday Brunch

Comedy, with Bryan Cranston and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Claire had £1.7million to spend, gained from a personal injury settlement. In 2012, Kirstie Allsopp was searching south London for a flat for Jen. She had spent the previous year in Kabul, Afghanistan, and had high expectations of what she could get for her budget. Now Phil catches up with both to see how they are getting on

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Eco campaigner Hector Christie holds the first dinner party in Devon, hoping his selection of raw food and home-grown produce will win him the £1,000 cash prize. His guests - make-up artist Kirsten Brend, slate salesman Damion Fearnley, theatre nurse Jenny Fox and retired housekeeper Viv Foster - are more interested in the stately home he lives in, so the host reveals an unusual surprise to command their attention

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up artist Kirsten Brend showcases her Danish roots while hosting the second dinner party in Devon, serving a traditional menu to celebrate her heritage and some Eurovision-style entertainment to demonstrate her singing skills

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Slate salesman Damion Fearnley hosts the third dinner party in Devon, hoping to impress his guests with a carefully crafted menu of restaurant quality food. No dish is as simple as it sounds, and Damion has given each one his own little twist. Unfortunately for him, two of the diners seem more intent on taking verbal swipes at each other than bites out of his food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre nurse Jenny Fox's dinner party in Devon fails to get off to the best start when Damion Fearnley is not impressed by the dishes on offer and Hector Christie takes exception to her choice of main course. Meanwhile, the tension between Viv Foster and Kirsten Brend continues as they show no sign of putting their disagreement behind them

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired housekeeper Viv Foster hosts the final night in Devon, and feels in confident mood after years of experience serving the rich and famous. She pulls out all the stops to impress with a butler, silver service and her favourite tried and tested recipes. With tension mounting between Viv and Kirsten for some time though, her plans to put on the perfect evening may yet be sabotaged

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Richard III in Middleham, North Yorkshire, a pub run by Ken Ward and his wife Sharon, who become suspicious when one couple check out before breakfast. The village is known for its horse racing links, but one of the competitors, Matt Wilson, has a fear of horses, and another couple are concerned at staying above a noisy pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Court House Unique Boutique B&B in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, where hosts Keith and Lisa Shearin hope to impress. On arrival, Ken and Sharon are blown away by their honeymoon suite and the seemingly low price. Suspicions over price fixing drive Matt and Paul to the internet to verify the room rate, where they discover an anomaly, and despite Keith's best efforts at breakfast, Jo and Louis dismiss it as being too fancy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Castley Camp in Otley, West Yorkshire, for the third day of the contest, owned by single mum Jo Stevenson and her son Louis. Some of the guests are horrified by stains on their bedding and dust in their room, while an afternoon boot camp fitness session reveals Keith's competitive side. At feedback, Jo is left fuming over the comments about cleanliness and breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at the Lion & Swan in Congleton, Cheshire, run by owner Paul Whyle and manager Matt Wilson. A dirty bathroom and a waterbed cause upset, while some guests are still fuming about previous negative feedback. However, the worst is left for breakfast, when Sharon reveals she has discovered their rooms online at a higher price than they were told, upsetting Keith and Lisa and leaving the hosts determined to clear their names

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. First up are Ken and Sharon from the Richard III, who want to learn more about what's been causing Jo and Louis to lose sleep. Next, Keith and Lisa from the Court House Unique Boutique B&B want to challenge Matt about the allegations of price fixing and vehemently fight their corner. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Chatsworth House: A Great British Year

programme.title: The Yorkshire Dales and the Lakes
programme.desc: Shepherds Peter and Robert Bland head to market with their older draft ewes, while in Cracoe, Barbara Slater and daughter Cathy remember Barbara's father

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at London's King's College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcet's disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasn't eaten for days following a relationship break-up

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The Craggy Island clerics face the prospect of an untimely death during the return flight from a visit to a holy shrine. Jack quickly commandeers the only parachute and bails out, taking the drinks trolley with him - leaving Ted and Dougal to their fate

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue
