programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple in Worcestershire who have given up the rat race, selling their town house to buy some land in the country. With just £50,000 they set out to construct their own home from the most unlikely of starting points - four old portable office buildings. Schoolteacher Lauren, who discovered an enormous pond hidden under decking in the back garden, sets out to transform the plot into a beach-themed holiday retreat. As George's Italian road trip continues, he travels to the old town of Mathi, north of Turin, where he finds a modernist gem of a home

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George is joined by leading architects to help transform some of Britain's most unloved houses into desirable properties. The team meet Simon and Lisa, who recently bought a building in rural Gloucestershire in such a shoddy state that neighbours compared it to the house in Amityville Horror. George teams the couple up with creative architect Laura Clark, who attempts to turn this terrifying building into a warm and welcoming, modern home, whilst retaining some of its original character

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trucker Tony Houston holds the first dinner party in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, hoping his menu of scallops on black pudding with pea puree, and sea bass with prawn mash will impress his fellow diners. However, if his food fails to live up to his expectations, he anticipates the whole ambience and presentation of the evening will secure him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthony Street hosts the second day in Essex, and has his work cut out trying to impress the diners after displaying some unusual table manners the previous night. However, he hopes his passion for quirky entertainment will be enough to win them over

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Claire Kelly hosts the third dinner party in Essex. Her devil-may-care approach does nothing to dampen her confidence, and she is convinced hers will be the winning night. Even if her chaotic cooking style and haphazard evening fail to win over the guests, the mother-of-two has some special entertainment lined up to gain a few extra points

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and foraging fan Richard Harris hosts the fourth night of the competition in the Clacton-on-Sea area of Essex. Not everybody is impressed when they discover he has had help, and Claire Kelly accuses him of being a food snob. However, he hopes a performance by the local church choir will help improve the atmosphere

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Kerrie Brinkley-Whittington hosts the final dinner party in Essex, and uses a few props to help her night go with a swing. However, she is soon under fire from entrepreneur Richard, who is not amused to be asked to contribute more to group conversations, and when trucker Tony makes an emergency run to the garden, it looks as if the rhubarb dessert could be just as controversial. At the end of the evening, the winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at the Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, Hampshire, where owner Jacqui Castle and her sidekick Jane Waters hope the homely approach will win the day. Guests Martin and Catherine Crosswaite are not encouraged by the shared facilities, while breakfast served at a communal table is not to the liking of Norman Butcher and Lorraine Watkins

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Bath's the Rising Sun Inn, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher hope to bring their guests up to standard by having a dress code. Following their feedback on the last visit, Jacqui and Jane take an extra critical eye to the rooms, while Martin and Catherine show their competitive streak during a boules match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Busfeild Arms in East Morton for the third day of the contest, where hosts Martin and Catherine Croswaite pride themselves in giving great Yorkshire hospitality. Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. Meanwhile, Martin shocks the group by sharing his stunt motorbike riding past, and later, Patrick feels the pressure of being the final host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggan's Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epstein's father. Jacqui and Jane are unimpressed by unpleasant smells in the bedroom, while Martin and Catherine show they will do anything to win during a game of Fab Four charades. At dinner, Patrick shocks his guests when he reveals his idea of the ideal woman. Will it have an effect on their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Jacqui and Jane from the Oak Tree Cottage want to find out why Norman and Lorraine wouldn't return, while Martin and Catherine from the Busfeild Arms have some explaining to do when it comes to their profit margins. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hospital theatre practitioner Geoff Conway holds the first dinner party in Wigan, hoping his nine-course Spanish tapas feast will impress his fellow diners and secure him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outgoing hair salon owner Natalie Crompton hosts the second dinner party in Wigan, and since she loves to party she plans a fun-filled night for her guests - including some very special treats

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Music teacher and funeral singer Alan Gregory hosts the third dinner party in Wigan, and lines up an evening of Greek food for his guests. However, his plans for a cultured soiree are soon spoiled by straight-talking Geoff Conway, who seems intent on causing arguments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gymnastics teacher Simon Grimwood is hoping to host a special evening on the fourth night of the contest in Wigan, Greater Manchester, because it is his birthday. He wants his 'posh' menu to dazzle his guests, but salon owner Natalie Crompton is worried about some of the food on offer. The other contestants also discover his secret lifelong passion for ferreting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse practitioner Caroline Heaven hosts the final night in Wigan, hoping to end the week by showing her guests a 'proper Lancashire night'. However, hospital theatre manager Geoff Conway is on the verge of being thrown out if he continues his run of misbehaviour. At the end of proceedings the winner of the £1,000 is revealed

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Andy Stakes and Jeanette Hardy, who are building a new house on top of a sheer cliff on the west coast of Scotland. The pair want to spend £250,000 on a two-bedroom, glass-fronted and earth-sheltered home for themselves and their two beloved Newfoundland dogs. However, construction on such an exposed site is fraught with danger and the pair face no end of problems throughout the build, and a last minute design change that begs the biggest question: even if Andy finishes the house, will Jeanette actually like it?

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man involved in a car crash needs to be carefully removed from his vehicle to protect his spine, but a fuel leak means the fire service cannot risk cutting the roof off

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Sarah, 35, arrives at King's College Hospital concerned that a brain tumour she first had as a teenager has returned. Helen, 47, is worried about her baby son James, who was born with a hole in his heart and one kidney, and has been vomiting since the morning, while 28-year-old Wayne seeks treatment for knife wounds to his leg after he tried to stop someone stealing his girlfriend's phone

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In this compilation, the medics race to dramatic cycling emergencies as they save cyclist Graham's partially amputated leg after a collision with a tractor

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp teams up with potter Richard Miller to help Ellie and Nick Harrington - who have no practical DIY skills - create plates to complement their 1930s-style dining room in Tunbridge Wells, Kent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Rhona Brennan and daughter Nina find the perfect family holiday home that could also work as a B&B in the French region of Limousin. Working within a budget of £165,000, Jasmine delivers five properties in spectacular locations, but it remains to be seen whether the pair will be bowled over by one of the options

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock and roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Maidenhead, Simon O'Brien falls in love with an old ship's carpenter's chest, while Henry Cole takes away a miniature Tether car, which he hopes to get started

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie has big plans to give her ground-floor apartment in her chateau's east wing a Renaissance revival, but support from Gerry and mother Isabelle turns out to be more of a hindrance than help. Sarah and George secure their first wedding booking and prepare to woo the couple as they visit the chateau for a planning meeting. Debbie and Nigel start renovating their chateau's salon, but need to down tools quickly as they get an unexpected last-minute booking

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Cumbrian couple Andy and Amy, who plan to build a huge four-bedroom home with a farmhouse feel. Despite having previously self-built twice before, the presenter worries Andy may have bitten off more than he can chew this time around

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Hope Mountain in Cymau, Flintshire, where husband and wife team Rob and Jo Smith hope their dog-friendly B&B will win the day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Beaumont Hotel in Louth, Lincolnshire, two guests are damning about the breakfast quality, so it remains to be seen how managers Steffi Stevenson and Sarah Banks will react

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Rock House Hotel in Lynmouth, Devon, where owner Emilio Tundidor is being ably assisted by his identical twin brother Fernando

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Troy House in Painswick, Gloucestershire, where owners Alan and Denise Newman hope the guests will love their rooms, but Emilio and Fernando are on the warpath

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet up for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple in Worcestershire who have given up the rat race, selling their town house to buy some land in the country. With just £50,000 they set out to construct their own home from the most unlikely of starting points - four old portable office buildings. Schoolteacher Lauren, who discovered an enormous pond hidden under decking in the back garden, sets out to transform the plot into a beach-themed holiday retreat. As George's Italian road trip continues, he travels to the old town of Mathi, north of Turin, where he finds a modernist gem of a home

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The zebras have a newcomer to their herd, Okoth, who starts to make a play for power, which does not go down well with zebra Florence. Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Debbie and Nigel start landscaping their five-acre grounds and risk a flat-pack fall out. Also requiring urgent attention is the tired roof terrace at the rear of the chateau which currently isn't watertight. Sarah and George run into trouble with the chateau's electrics as they host their first-ever wedding. Dick gets to work re-levelling the chateau's long driveway and Stephanie turns her attention to a new, modern apartment in the chateau's old stables

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Paul and Penny Denby, who are demolishing their mock-Georgian home on an exclusive south London estate to replace it with a contemporary mansion. The couple have little building experience and struggle with the dozens of design decisions they must make, and find themselves £250,000 short of the amount needed to finish the property

programme.title: Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland
programme.desc: The former ballerina and Strictly Come Dancing judge explores the islands off the west coast of Scotland and finds out more about her Scottish ancestry. Her odyssey begins on the Isle of Skye, where she tries scallops fresh from a loch, has a bash at step dancing and goes wild swimming in honour of her grandfather

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Kevin, 57, arrives at King's College Hospital in London with breathing difficulties, having fallen off a ladder onto a metal bar, while 11-year-old Archie has cut his lip in an accident at school and is worried about stitches. Elsewhere, a drink-related fall has left 53-year-old John with a head injury, and barman Ross, 31, needs treatment for a fractured eye socket following an alcohol-fuelled night out

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with regular Sean Lock and guest captain Sarah Millican joined by Bob Mortimer and Katherine Ryan. Alex Horne and the Horne Section preside alongside Countdown regular Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley provides the letters and numbers

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal takes over as Craggy Island's new milkman, but his predecessor, local womaniser Pat Mustard, returns to exact an explosive revenge on Ted for getting him sacked. Starring Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UK's national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.desc: Yianni Charalambous works on a chrome-red wrap for a luxury 4x4, given to a 17-year-old as his first car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef ends his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures by visiting Bangladesh, sampling the curry on offer in the country that has played a major role in establishing the success of Indian restaurants throughout the UK

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an edition first broadcast in 2007, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May celebrate British Leyland's 40th birthday by trying to boost the reputation of the cars that once rolled off its production line. The Aston Martin DBS is put through its paces on the test track, Jennifer Saunders is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car and the team asks whatever happened to the beach buggy

programme.title: American Pickers: Best Of
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz make good on a promise to restore a 1935 Auburn and take the original owners for a ride

programme.title: American Pickers: Best Of
programme.desc: Highlights of Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz's adventures trawling junk yards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson test-drives two estate cars - the BMW M5 and Mercedes E63. Richard Hammond tries out motor-home racing, while James May pits an Alfa Romeo 159 against a man who crosses the Humber estuary without using its famous bridge. The Stig puts Honda's Civic Type R through its paces and former England rugby union forward Lawrence Dallaglio is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Engineer Ralph Hosier leads two teams of car buffs in their bid to build scrap cars. This time, they're up against pro driver Shane Lynch's Chevrolet Camaro in a plane-pulling contest. Building scrap able to get the 40-ton monster rolling will require innovation and a super-sized imagination.

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Pro driver Shane Lynch's Mercedes X-Class pick-up sets a benchmark on a high-speed rock crawl. Then, in just four days, engineer Ralph Hosier and his two teams of car enthusiasts must find a way to out-engineer a slice of precision German technology

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson puts the Renaultsport Twingo 133 through a stringent examination in Belfast - with a helping hand from actor Ross Kemp. Richard Hammond samples the delights of racing airport vehicles, and James May takes the Vauxhall Insignia VXR for a drive in the company of Margaret Calvert, whose ideas were central to the design of modern British road signs. Film director Guy Ritchie is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and there is also a group test of high-performance off-roaders from BMW, Audi and Range Rover

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Compilation of two features on classic cars and SUVs. The presenters immerse themselves in the world of classic cars, with Jeremy Clarkson in a Fiat 124 Spider, Richard Hammond in an MGB GT and James May in a Peugeot 304 Cabriolet. They also enter the realm of the sports utility vehicle as they find out what sort of SUV can be bought for just a few hundred pounds before putting them through a series of challenges

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The crew finds a machine capable of transforming the shape of any living thing by altering its genetic make-up, a discovery resulting in a desperate fight for survival. Starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The crew lands on a prison planet where crime is prevented by a 'Justice Field', but Rimmer finds himself convicted by his own feelings of guilt of 1,169 murders - the crew of Red Dwarf, who died after he failed to replace a drive plate properly. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: The friends' plans for a relaxing summer holiday don't get off to the best of starts when Lee gets a bad case of the jitters on the plane - and Lucy and Daisy have to endure the worst flight of their lives. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix, with Hugh Dennis

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee is worried that the woman of his dreams is drifting farther away - and admits his fears to Toby over a few drinks in the bar. Can his neighbour give him the advice he needs to win Lucy's heart once and for all? Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Hugh Dennis, with Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: The will-they-won't-they tension between Lee and Lucy reaches unseen new highs in this epic finale for Christmas. Sally Bretton, Bobby Ball and Katy Wix co-star

programme.title: Mel Giedroyc: Unforgivable
programme.desc: Comedy show in which the nation's favourite comics and celebrities compete to convince Mel that they are the most Unforgivable person in the room. In each episode three celebrities come clean and regale tales of their most despicable deeds and uncharitable behaviour as they are probed by host Mel Giedroyc and her assistant Lou Sanders for all the dastardly details. In this episode, Mel and Lou are joined by Graham Norton, Desiree Burch and Alex Brooker. Graham reveals a lie to his mother that went too far, and Alex talks about trying to catch a girl in a trap

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Dermot O'Leary, Mel Giedroyc, Josh Widdicombe and Matt Dawson join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Cameras follow old friends Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer as they continue on their angling trip round the UK. In the Monsal Valley in Derbyshire, Paul tries to teach Bob how to fly fish for wild rainbow trout, and the pair reflect on their humble beginnings, their careers and their comedy contemporaries. Later, Bob cooks Paul his very personal recipe of tuna melanie on the river bank, and it soon transpires his cooking is a lot more successful than his fishing

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by actress and comedian Morgana Robinson for a two-day break in the Italian city of Milan, taking in art, pasta, the bowling game of bocce, and a drink in Backdoor 43 - a tiny bar that can hold a maximum of four customers at a time. At a viewing of Leonardo da Vinci's The Last Supper, Richard finds the painting to be quite good, but Morgana thinks it's 'no Tracey Emin'. The pair also take in the city's epic cathedral and drop in on a pasta-making lesson that proves strangely musical

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian Katherine Ryan joins host Richard Ayoade on a 48-hour ram raid of the Big Apple. The duo's packed-to-overflow schedule sees them scale tall buildings, grab some culture in museums large and small and even attempt to rollerblade. Experiences include trips to the Metropolitan Museum of Art and the Rockefeller Centre, queuing at the hottest patisserie in Manhattan for a cronut, and enjoying a free ferry ride to the Statue of Liberty. There's even time for Richard to reach the point of meltdown

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: In the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman, Steve leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: Border Patrol's elite tactical unit, BORTAC, seeks to capture a group of traffickers who are determined to move their drugs through the desert

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson and James May try to find the perfect car for 17-year-olds, dealing with insurance companies, accident repairs and a muddy music festival car park in the process. Richard also visits Abu Dhabi to test the Lamborghini Murcielago SV and stages a race between the 1000hp Bugatti Veyron and the McLaren F1. Actor, writer and comedian Stephen Fry is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters find three small cars at an affordable price - a task that involves pestering bankers, harnessing large dogs and almost getting arrested. James May meets American rally driver Ken Block, and Jeremy Clarkson tests out the Mercedes SL Black. Comedian Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef experiences the bustling and colourful fish market in the Sicilian city of Catania and discovers dishes developed through centuries of poverty in Puglia on Italy's mainland. However, he is shocked to wake up one morning to find his vehicle is missing

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Motor racing driver Lewis Hamilton demonstrates his abilities on the test track, and Richard Hammond tries his hand in a Formula One car. Jeremy Clarkson and James May assess historic vehicles to establish which one pioneered the control layout used in modern cars, and singer-songwriter James Blunt is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters and the Stig enter a 24-hour endurance race at Silverstone, which proves to be one of their toughest challenges to date. programme.title: Room 101

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The coral and shipwrecks found off the shores of the tropical islands, and how the different kinds of reef have given rise to a huge diversity of underwater life in the area. programme.title: Wild Caribbean

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Bike guru Henry Cole and ace mechanic Sam Lovegrove are in the Queen's realm as they visit a shed in the shadow of Windsor Castle. Will they find a royal bargain of a motorcycle?

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Back in Northern Ireland, bike guru Henry Cole and ace mechanic Sam Lovegrove discover some lovely vintage cars as well as some modern motors. What will they take home?

programme.title: Supertruckers
programme.desc: Steve, Sharpie and Andy take on Metcalfe's biggest ever job moving three massive oil rig sections. Simon and Paul bite off more than they can chew in a dockside move

programme.title: Fantomworks
programme.desc: The guys have 85 cars to work on and while Steve wrestles with a cantankerous 1965 BSA motorcycle, Bobby tackles the mechanical problems of a 1969 Camaro

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: The artisan restorers behind Drew Pritchard's antiques empire save an iconic Eames lounge chair. They also revive an unusual 90-year old oil lamp and a glamourous steam trunk

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Young Guns spend all of their savings on a hydraulic digger that causes more problems than it solves. Elsewhere, the Blacklighters are dealt a dose of reality

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer goes in search of a Lotus Elan for sale, before handing the keys of the British sports car to Edd China so he can give the vehicle a new lease of life

programme.title: Mega Shippers

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Restoration experts pitch for the job of bringing dilapidated items back to life in return for a share of the sale price that the owner receives, with the opening edition featuring a vintage FH Ayres rocking horse, a 1930s GPO bicycle, and a chair that is also a toilet

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Makeup artist Charlie brings in a Scandinavia table with two legs sawn off, while photographer Murray brings in an original printer's cabinet, complete with brass fonts

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Agricultural officer Christie brings in an iron bath rescued from a dilapidated Scottish estate, and later, window cleaner Karen arrives with a vintage linen press

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: A combination of Money for Nothing and The Repair Shop, in which people bring in their old items to be brought back to life. But there's a twist. The experts pitch for the chance to complete the job - then take a share of any profit when the restored relic is sold. Today's items are an unusual paraffin stove, a set of dilapidated farmhouse drawers and a battered travel chest

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Britain's best makers and menders go head to head, pitching for the job of bringing some dilapidated relics back to life in return for a share of the item's sale price. Simon from Nottingham is hoping to find a furniture enthusiast to breathe new life into an unusual pair of armchairs. Ben from Leeds brings in his grandfather's old machining lathe, hoping either restorers Alastair or Bruce can help get this old lathe purring like a kitten once more. The final item is a rare and innovative wardrobe, known as a gentleman's compactum, brought in by Sean from north Wales

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Glasgow couple face a major renovation project at their Italian rural retreat, while a couple from Brighton take on the French at their own game by opening a cheese and wine bar

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Foodies from Brighton are left high and dry on the opening night of their cheese and wine bar, and there's an unwelcome infestation for glampsite owners in Portugal.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Glampsite owners in Portugal face the reality of living off-grid, and at a horse riding centre in France, cameras follow a mother and daughter with grand plans

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The owners of a glampsite have transport trouble in Portugal. A former art teacher opens a gallery in Spain, while mother-and-daughter equestrians hope to ride out a rough patch

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the season draws to a close for the Brits abroad, the owners of a glampsite in Portugal get hands-on at a goat farm. In France, two Brits attempt to host a wine-tasting night. Meanwhile, at a riding centre, a mother and daughter have cause to celebrate

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A zebra foal is threatened by a leopard that has stolen into the herd's enclosure, while a teenage rhino reluctant to leave his mother is encouraged by rangers to find a mate. A hyena cub who is the runt of his litter is used to coming last when food is divided up between his siblings - until he happens upon a dead antelope

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: An aspiring Paralympian goes on a date with a former footballer, while a double divorcee hopes to make it third time lucky, if her long list of very specific requirements do not hold her back. A car salesman ponders how to raise the subject of BDSM on his first date with a primary school teacher, and a previous visitor to the bar returns for a second try

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the game show mash-up, with Rachel Riley and Susie Dent. Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe take on Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade. Nick Helm joins Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer returns to Cullercoats on North Tyneside to catch up with Mark and Suze, who were unable to agree on what to do with their four-bed Victorian town house. When Kirstie and Phil first met the couple nine months earlier, emotional ties to their home had left them in limbo, with Suzie feeling like she was unable to leave, but Mark longed to move into a bigger home with a better layout for their family. Now, Phil returns to find out if they followed through with their decision

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but it's not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take more of the work themselves

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Presenters Ant and Dec join Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty in their cafe on Southend Pier. The Saturday Night Takeaway hosts love sushi, so Jamie and Jimmy help get them ready to rumble with a beginner's guide to Japanese cooking. Away from the bistro, Jamie rustles up a mouth-watering Italian-style steak and chips, while Jimmy demonstrates a simple crispy chicken that looks impressive without taking hours. Out on the road, Jamie and Jimmy train as baristas at a coffee company that helps homeless people get back on their feet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Unicorn Inn in Ludlow, Shropshire, where husband and wife team Lee and Zoe Osbourne hope their glamorous fairy-tale style rooms will impress

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The fallout from the previous day's vote casts a shadow over the group, but Brendan does his best to cheer them up with some budget-busting activities

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Her guests are horse-mad Emily, who's 40, 56-year-old Caribbean takeaway owner Clive, 23-year-old beauty therapist Chiara and mature student and self-confessed foodie Gary. A power cut threatens to scupper Louise's night before it's even started, until her husband - and farmer - Roddy and his generator come to the rescue. Will the night impress the guests, and particularly the self-appointed Thai food expert at the table?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second night from Hastings and Rye in East Sussex sees host Emily plan an evening of comfort food, including carrot and parsnip soup, meat loaf and apple and blackberry crumble

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian mature student Gary hosts the third dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning an evening filled with fun, flash and fabulous flavour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former 1960s pop star Dec hosts the next dinner party from Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, planning to impress his guests with musical surprises and a simple seaside menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Hastings and Rye, East Sussex, beauty therapist Chiara returns to her roots to throw an Italian dinner party. However, Irish crooner Dec gets on his host's wrong side when he questions her interest in healing crystals and likens her to a page three glamour girl

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a midwife and her father to find a holiday home in Menorcan resort Cala en Porter with a pool and space to set up a beauty salon, on a budget of £325,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Newcastle couple Mick and Dianne find a holiday home in and around Gran Alacant on Spain's Costa Blanca, showing them properties within their budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman goes house hunting on Spain's Costa Blanca with Barnsley couple Paul and Lisa, who cannot wait to buy their first property together in the ever-popular resort of Torrevieja. They have three children and seven grandchildren wanting to visit, so the pressure is on Jasmine to find a holiday home the whole family can enjoy. With a £72,000 budget, she shows them five options - but will any measure up to their expectations?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lisa and daughter Jordan are searching for their dream holiday home around the beautiful inland villages of Andalucía. They particularly love the town of Velez-Malaga, so Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties in the area for their budget of £75,000. They have set their sights on a traditional Spanish property with a modern twist, so will Jonnie be able to deliver?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting along the south-east coast of Cyprus with mother and daughter Pat and Tash from Reading, Berkshire. Pat has been longing to buy a holiday home for 20 years, but has always been too busy working and caring for her family to turn the dream into a reality. Now she's retired, she's finally seizing the moment, and is poised to consider the five options Scarlette has found for her within her £70,000 budget

Meanwhile, Phil meets chemical engineers TJ and Chee, who moved from Malaysia to the UK to ignite their careers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Aberdeen, where 32-year-old offshore logistics supervisor Michelle, hopes to win over her guests with her 'Weegie' wit and prove that Glaswegians have more fun. The guests she's out to impress are 46-year-old year farmer Turid, 30-year-old comedy promoter Naz, 28-year-old gas and oil purchasing specialist Sylvian and 21-year-old economics student David. After a tagine with a Glaswegian twist and the mother of all balloon games, what more can she possibly do to charm her guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Confident economics undergraduate David is next to host in Aberdeen, but will his student grub earn him 10 out of 10 with his guests? The 1920s Gatsby-themed dress code goes down a storm with almost everyone, on a night featuring food ending up on the floor, smoke alarms going off and some entertaining cocktail-making

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas purchasing specialist Sylvian hosts the third dinner party in Aberdeen, hoping her attention to detail and an ambitious global themed menu will be enough to impress her guests. Philippines-born Sylvian's dishes are an East-meets-West affair, starting with Japanese gyoza, followed by a Sumatran rendang and ending with a very British sticky toffee pudding. But dessert turns out to be sticky in more ways than one; cue tears before bedtime from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, it's the turn of comedy promoter Naz to host. Naz is, by his own admission, not the greatest cook and things don't go according to plan and much of his food is burned and difficult to chew. Ever the eternal optimist however, Naz thinks that his humour and conviviality will win over his critics and earn him the grand

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in Aberdeen finds journalist Turid hoping her home-grown produce will tantalise her guests' taste buds. Can Turid knock Sylvian off the top spot and walk away with the £1,000 prize?

programme.desc: Carrie clashes with the staff at an Italian restaurant and forbids Doug from ever going back there - but he just cannot resist their food. Meanwhile, Arthur prepares for an appearance on TV. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: An incident featuring a wheelie bin and a birthday cake sparks a bitter conflict between two neighbours in Wales, and there are explosive consequences when householders take the law into their own hands after continuous loud music drives them to distraction. Meanwhile, a Suffolk man faces eviction after his fellow residents report his toxic cars to the local environmental health office

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a man moves in to his parents' home to help put a stop to a neighbour's harassment, but events escalate into violence. In Essex, a mother and her daughter find what seems to be the perfect house, only for their lives to be made a misery after they object to a planning application for an extension. Two elderly residents who feel they are the victims of noise from next door have to deny any wrongdoing themselves when the police arrive on their doorstep

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to south west London to chase almost £2,000 owed by a cafe owner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An evasive man in west London is given a choice between paying up or relinquishing his luxury car, there's a writ for the organiser of a music festival, an aggressive rent defaulter needs evicting, and an entire hole family is angered in Hertfordshire when the agents call to collect a loan owed to a woman's ex-partner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market. English teacher Muhammad is suffering from serious financial difficulty as his tenant has refused to pay rent for more than four months - and to make matters worse, the tenant has been subletting rooms in his property. In north-west London, a bedsit fire exposes a negligent landlord, while in Cheshire, Carl is shocked to hear squatters are living in his property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The case of Edmund Kemper, who began by murdering his grandparents, before going on to kill and dismember six college girls, his mother and her friend

programme.title: One Punch Killers
programme.desc: Cameras follow Aaron Roach Bridgeman as he hears from the families of people who died after being struck just once by an assailant, and investigates the science behind the violence to find out exactly how a single punch can kill. He also tracks down the perpetrator of one of these attacks to get his side of the story, and brings him together with the mother of the man he killed to find out if she can ever truly forgive him for the death of her son

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Nadia, the daughter of a self-made Jordanian businessman samples life with teenage mum-of-two Natalie, who has had to scrub other people's toilets just to get by

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A group of residents in Guildford object when the occupant of a one-bedroom council flat decides to transform his home into a 'cannabis cafe'. Having turned a blind eye to their unruly neighbour's all-night parties and unwelcome lodgers, this latest development proves to be a step too far. In a small community in Wales, new arrivals cause a stir when they decide to convert a local pub into their new home, and in Lincolnshire, a young father becomes the victim of a violent assault after asking the man living in the flat below his to keep the noise down

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila and Des stage a fake date to uncover Clive's real feelings, but their plan backfires. Hendrix steals a gun out of fear, and ends up hiding it in the Kennedy pizza oven

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari and Tane need to act quickly on Paul's ultimatum, and end up telling Nikau the truth. Bella discovers how lonely she is, and John gets stood up by his date

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Reality show in which two families from opposite ends of the wealth and class divide swap homes, budgets and social status for seven days to discover how the other half lives. The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. He meets Allana, whose two Labradors Teddy and Fudge pull her along at break-neck speed when out walking. He then visits Peggy, a cross-breed with a penchant for escaping, no matter how much her owners try to keep her penned in. Finally, Graeme heads to Blackpool, where Stanley the terrier has been struggling ever since his best friend Sweep died

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow bulk buyer Zana, who shops for the biggest offers, and Allan, who has invested in a yacht to live a champagne lifestyle on a lemonade budget

programme.title: Celebs on the Farm

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A daytime soap queen's husband is shot dead - but, luckily, one of her neighbours just happens to be amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher. With Angela Lansbury. Guest starring Kate Mulgrew (Star Trek: Voyager)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's sleuthing skills come into play as she sets out to clear a university colleague of a murder charge, after a man who apparently migrated to New York on a revenge mission is killed. Angela Lansbury and George Hearn star

programme.desc: Jessica tries to clear medic Seth Hazlitt after he is threatened with a possible malpractice suit when the owner of Cabot Cove's computer company dies in mysterious circumstances. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Mexico City on a research trip, and her arrival coincides with the theft of the National Museum's most prized artefact, the solid gold Death Mask of Montezuma. When Enrico Montejano, a corrupt local businessman suspected of the crime, is found murdered, Jessica offers to help the police find the culprit

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to California to help playwright Martin Tremaine come to terms with his wife's suicide - but the killing of another member of his family makes her realise he was the intended victim. Guest starring Darren McGavin and Ken Kercheval

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A spate of murder and mayhem shocks Cabot Cove - and it coincides with the arrival of one of Seth's old army friends, who immediately becomes the prime suspect. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica devises an ingenious new board game with a murderous theme - and it is not long before life starts imitating art in deadly fashion. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A female producer is intent on scuppering a project forged at a film festival, only to die in mysterious circumstances. Jessica investigates and soon brings the villain to book. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury and Susan Blakely

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Controversy grips New York when a black teenager is shot by a white celebrity chef, who claims she was defending herself against the city's serial rapist - an assumption that proved incorrect. Assistant District Attorney Barba faces a tough battle against a shrewd defence lawyer as he seeks justice for the victim and his family

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An officer accuses his former colleagues from the 12th Precinct of fraud and cover-ups, but it results in him being committed to a psychiatric ward. The Internal Affairs Bureau asks members of the SVU to assist their investigation, and Cassidy is sent in undercover - but his life is threatened when someone in the crooked team is prepared to stop at nothing to keep things the way they are

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives make their way to a recording studio after receiving a domestic abuse call from prominent R'n'B singer Mischa, who claims she was attacked by her rapper boyfriend. Armed with information as to his likely whereabouts, Amaro and Fin head off to confront him

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The trial of pimp Bart Ganzel begins. Meanwhile, Detective Cassidy is accused of raping a woman while undercover, resulting in a court appearance of his own. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate the case of a female lawyer found dead on a bus, having been forcibly injected with a fatal overdose of bee venom causing an anaphylactic shock. Monroe helps determine it to be the work of a feral bee queen, the sworn enemy of Hexebiests and the investigators' attention switches to a legal case the victim was working on just prior to her death

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A woman is struck by a car while suffering terrifying hallucinations. Though seriously injured she survives the accident, but during the commotion an unidentified man arrives on the scene and strangles her. Nick and Hank investigate, and discover a goat-like creature that could be behind a series of recent disappearances

programme.title: Columbo: Forgotten Lady (1975)
programme.desc: An agelong actress grows desperate to recapture her glory days and resorts to murdering her husband and making it look like suicide. She hopes the publicity will revive her flagging Broadway career, but she reckons without Columbo's uncanny ability to see through her devious performance. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Janet Leigh, Sam Safe and John Payne

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly

programme.title: Columbo: Identity Crisis (1975)
programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sarah Walsh wakes up from a night of partying believing she has been raped for a second time and calls Detective Benson, who handled her previous case. The search for Sarah's attacker leads the police to a smooth-talking cyber mogul who preys on vulnerable girls and bribes them for their silence

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate the death of a popular music teacher eaten by rats in his car. A feral-like character running a pest control firm seems a likely suspect. His son, a gifted violinist, was recently suspended from classes. However, when the parent is arrested and abused in jail, the boy snaps and sets a trap for the rich children who routinely abuse and bully him

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick investigate the case of a man whose house exploded two months after his brother's death in a similar incident. Meanwhile, a mysterious female biker is seen stalking the survivor, and she is later revealed as an ex-girlfriend of Monroe's

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

However, the mystery surrounding his murder deepens as the corpse goes missing only to reappear with a new identity. Whodunit, guest starring Trevor Eve and Sharon Maughan

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a model and discover splashes of blood that obviously did not come from the victim, but suggest the culprit is a relative. With Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crime-scene investigator is killed in her apartment, and evidence initially leads Lupo and Bernard to her fiance - until a journalist is attacked by a taxi driver, and DNA evidence opens up an entirely new line of inquiry. Drama, starring Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate after an aspiring musician is found dead behind a bin, and a bag of money left nearby leads them to a number of suspects. One of them confesses to the shooting, but says he only did it because he thought his daughter had been abducted. Further investigation by the detectives reveals that there may be a link between their case and a possible terrorist threat. Guest starring Michael Kenneth Williams (The Wire, Boardwalk Empire)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two teens from an underachieving high school are accused of burning to death a student from a more successful charter school. Lupo and Bernard investigate, and soon begin to suspect the boys' principal is providing them with a bogus alibi. Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a woman is found brutally murdered, and the evidence leads them to a medical school student. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs is injured in an explosion while conducting inquiries aboard a ship. He lapses into a coma, during which he has flashbacks of the past he has always kept hidden. Meanwhile, Tony takes over the investigation, but his approach begins to cause friction

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs emerges from his coma, but is suffering from amnesia - hindering the team's attempts to unravel a terrorist plot, as he is the only person likely to possess information on the would-be perpetrator's plans. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: One of the NCIS agents is starstruck after the team investigates an explosion outside the home of Navy Petty Officer First Class Todd Nicholas and his wife, popular reality TV performer Sheba Nicholas. Elsewhere, Vance continues physical therapy for the injuries sustained when he was held hostage. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Tara Holt star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sports reporter seeks Benson's help to accuse a cameraman of rape, but only agrees to press charges after she discovers the man is stalking her. Before the trial begins the team finds out she is pregnant, and ADA Barba must contend with questionable defence tactics as a result

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives investigate after a school nurse notices multiple injuries on a young girl. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Dustin and Lauren are captured by a drug dealer in the forest, who is subsequently murdered in a mysterious fashion. programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Staff grow anxious when orang-utan Hsiao-quai refuses to bring her newborn baby indoors during a storm. programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison Cronin retrieves a squirrel monkey that has become aggressive and started chewing its tail after living alone for 20 years in a cage in Essex. Back at base, a delivery of mangoes proves popular among the chimps, and the team learns of a forthcoming arrival

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison Cronin and her colleagues prepare to transport an overweight orang-utan from South Africa back to the Monkey World rescue centre in Dorset. programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The experts face unexpected problems at the airport as they prepare to fly Oshine to the UK, leaving them struggling to keep the overweight orang-utan calm. Back at Monkey World, a baby chimpanzee tries to take advantage of its privileged position and capuchin monkeys get to grips with frozen fruit

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Oshine has an eventful first night in the orang-utan nursery, and Jeremy Keeling realises helping the new arrival settle in will not be a straightforward task. programme.title: 999 Frontline

programme.title: 999 Frontline

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)

programme.title: A Chorus of Disapproval (1988)

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: A small-time hoodlum inadvertently becomes a celebrity after stealing a taxi. With Keith Allen, Jennifer Saunders and Robbie Coltrane

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael Caine buys a birthday present for Mrs Huggett. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: Part one of an interview with the former rugby union star, who toured with the British & Irish Lions on three occasions, and twice served as the captain of the team

programme.title: Sporting Heroes
programme.desc: Part two of an interview with the former rugby union star, who toured with the British & Irish Lions on three occasions, and twice served as the captain of the team

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Extended highlights of the First Test at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane, as the 2013 three-match series got under way. The tourists had already played here against Queensland Reds and will have been aware of the need to start strongly against the injury-hit Wallabies. Lions coach Warren Gatland has a strong squad to select from and was looking to begin in the same fashion as the 2001 vintage, who won in Brisbane in the opening Test of that tour

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the Second Test at the Etihad Stadium in Melbourne, as the Lions aimed to clinch the 2013 series after winning a thrilling First Test 23-21. The Lions suffered their heaviest defeat on this ground during the 2001 tour, as the Aussies overturned a half-time deficit to run away 35-14 victors. With just one Test remaining, the result here will determine whether there is anything riding on next Saturday's final showdown

programme.title: British and Irish Lions Tour
programme.desc: Australia v British & Irish Lions. Action from the third and final Test at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, as the 2013 tour reached its conclusion. The opening two Tests were both decided by the narrowest of margins - the Lions prevailed 23-21 in the opener in Brisbane, as Australia missed a chance to win the match with the final kick of the game, before the Wallabies earned revenge by triumphing 16-15 in Melbourne, with the visitors failing to score from a last-gasp penalty attempt on that occasio

programme.title: Rugby Union Retro
programme.desc: James Gemmell & Miles Harrison wind back the clock with Jamie Roberts to remember the deciding test of the Australia v British & Irish Lions series from 2013

programme.desc: An interview with the former boxer, who reigned supreme in the featherweight division in the latter half of the 1990s, but came unstuck when he faced Marco Antonio Barrera. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty
